primary_variables.matched_definition: Genetic perturbation that reduces or eliminates gene function.
evidence: Proteins were depleted by two sequential transfections with 40 nM siRNA
TCP1 knockdown resulted in a marked decrease in the overall amount of CSA
Knockdown of these TRiC subunits using different siRNAs also caused a reduction in the CSA levels

primary_variables.matched_definition: Base or amino-acid substitution (for example SNV, point mutation, engineered missense).
evidence: we created eight different CSA mutants in which one of the residues Glu103, Phe120, Lys122, Arg164, Lys247, Lys292, Lys293, or Arg354 in this platform was substituted by Alanine
we then generated a CSA mutant (CSA 8M) that contains all the eight afore-studied mutations
we created GFP-tagged CSA constructs harboring patient mutations A160T, A205P, or D266G

primary_variables.matched_definition: Intervention using a compound that inhibits a target protein, pathway, or process.
evidence: treatment with a TRiC inhibitor (TRiCi), which has been shown to inhibit archaeal TCP1 activity in vitro, led to a substantial decrease in CSA levels

primary_variables.matched_definition: Exposure to UV or intense light causing photodamage or photostress.
evidence: UV damage was induced using a 254-nm TUV PL-S 9W lamp (Philips).
Following UV damage, COP9 is likely displaced by CSB when CSA becomes incorporated into the TC-NER complex
Proteins were depleted by two sequential transfections with 40 nM siRNA
Cells were seeded in 96-well plates, transfected with siRNAs (see above) and after 48 h irradiated with UV-C

attributes.route_or_context: added to attached cells in six-well plates every 24 h
evidence: Medium supplemented with 2.5 mM 2-[(4-chloro-2λ4,1,3-benzothiadiazol-5-yl)oxy]acetic acid (Vitas-M Laboratory Ltd., via MolPort-002-507-960) was added to attached cells in six-well plates every 24 h during 72 h.
UV damage was induced using a 254-nm TUV PL-S 9W lamp (Philips).

replicate_hints: GFP immunoprecipitations for LFQ and stoichiometry analysis were performed in triplicate
two independent experiments were conducted [for cross-linking MS]
multiplex_channel_hints: unlabeled l-arginine-HCl and l-lysine-HCL or 13C6,15N4l-arginine-HCl and 13C6,15N2l-lysine-2HCL

evidence: TCP1 knockdown resulted in a marked decrease in the overall amount of CSA when compared to control cells treated with siRNAs against Luciferase
pulldown of GFP-tagged CSA WT and CSA 8M from CSA-deficient patient cells showed decreased binding of CSA 8M to CSB, DDB1, and CUL4A when compared to CSA WT
pulldown of these mutants from U2OS cells revealed substantially increased TRiC binding as compared to wild-type CSA

targets_and_enrichments.ontology_label: Affinity purification coupled with mass spectrometry proteomics
Chemical cross-linking coupled with mass spectrometry proteomics

base_candidates_ranked.reason: Explicit mention of label-free quantification (LFQ) using MaxQuant for identification and quantification of peptides.
The methods section describes a SILAC experiment using 13C6,15N4l-arginine and 13C6,15N2l-lysine for identifying CSA-interacting proteins.

modifier_candidates_ranked.reason: Explicit use of BS3 (bis(sulfosuccinimidyl)suberate) for on-bead cross-linking and analysis with pLink.
